rationale: Both reviews identify the same three scope violations (bundled class, vacuous IsUnipotent, True-stub typeclasses) and correctly block. Review 2's second finding is more precise: it additionally flags that IsUnipotent is defined on `GroupLike k A` (the wrong points type, as `AlgPoints` at line 40 is the correct one), giving the maintainer an extra actionable insight confirmed against the diff. Otherwise the reviews are substantively equivalent.
